0.title: Features
0.content: . | Execute RL algorithms on B machines | Use ProB as the formal execution engine | Define safety constraints with B invariants | Define rewards directly in the B specification | Visualise learned traces and cumulative rewards | .

1.title: BRein Studio
1.content: BRein Studio is a framework for Safe Reinforcement Learning from executable B models. It connects Reinforcement Learning algorithms with B specifications through ProB, allowing agents to learn directly from formally specified systems.
